title: CI artifact zip reader source paths for package ingest

source.subject: fix(ci): add missing Services/Artifacts sources for package zip reader

body:
## Outcome

Add missing Services/Artifacts sources for package zip reader.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`e3cc8a6`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/e3cc8a6) — fix(ci): add missing Services/Artifacts sources for package zip reader
